metadata.source: Local Law 251 registry (maximal DOT + cross-agency essentials)
metadata.description: All relevant DOT datasets w/ real columns + 311(filtered)/centerline/NTA/in-house resurfacing. Superseded historicals excluded. +gap-fill: demographics, heat-vuln, ped-crashes, trees, sidewalk-cafe, utility/street-cut permits, DOB sheds.
metadata.fk_graph: auto-derived from registry columns (entity + geo hubs)
